title: Sony WF-1000XM5 True Wireless Noise Canceling Earbuds
summary: The Sony WF-1000XM5 set the benchmark for true wireless earbuds in the premium segment. Our research suggests these offer the best combination of active noise cancellation, sound quality, and comfort currently available in a true wireless form factor.
pros: Exceptional audio quality with LDAC codec support
Compact and lightweight — among the smallest in its class
Multipoint connection — pairs with 2 devices simultaneously
Excellent call quality with AI-enhanced noise reduction
cons: Battery life (8 hours ANC on) is average for the class
Ear tips can cause fatigue for some users over extended wear
Case is larger than some competitors
bestFor: Frequent travelers and commuters who need strong ANC
Audiophiles who want high-resolution wireless audio
Remote workers on lots of calls
Those willing to invest in the best wireless earbuds available
verdict: The Sony WF-1000XM5 is the benchmark by which all other premium earbuds are measured. Our research confirms that for anyone who regularly works or travels in noisy environments, the ANC performance alone justifies the investment.
